content:
# Session 30 (iter-030) — review

## Metadata
- Stage: prover (`mathlib-build`). Lane = **1.3 (`H_locallyFree`) brick 6 — free conclusion + EGA reduction (CLOSE)**.
- **Sorry: 4 → 3.** Closed `H_locallyFree_of_ext_vanishing` (the last 1.3 sorry). **§1 result (1.3) is DONE.**
- Axioms: 17 → **20** `External.*` (+3 NEW, all planned/sanctioned EGA inputs; within the ≤3 budget). Build exit 0 (8475 jobs, 38s). `lean_verify` axiom-clean on both headline theorems.
- Targets attempted: `H_locallyFree_of_ext_vanishing` (SOLVED). The 3 surviving sorries (`H_tensor_invertible`, `H_tensor`, `ext_finite_flat`) UNTOUCHED — correctly off-lane.

## Headline
The multi-iter functor-`T` lane (open since iter-023) is **structurally COMPLETE**. Brick 6 landed all five planner STEPs A–E plus two private transport helpers, axiom-clean. The reversal tripwire did NOT fire — the plan's two flagged "possibly-absent" Mathlib lemmas both turned out to be present (`Module.Projective.iff_split_of_projective`, `Module.free_of_flat_of_isLocalRing`).

## Solved — `H_locallyFree_of_ext_vanishing` (7 decls + re-sign, axiom-clean)
Section `### Brick 6 of (1.3)` at EOF. Decls:
- `surjective_of_natIso_map` (private, ~2098) — `α : F ≅ G` (`Type`-valued) transports `Surjective (G.map φ) → Surjective (F.map φ)`. **unmatched** (needs blueprint). API iterations: `congrFun (α.inv.naturality φ)` type-mismatched → `rw [types_comp]` pattern-not-found → `FunctorToTypes.naturality` deprecated → final `NatTrans.naturality_apply` + `ConcreteCategory.comp_apply/id_apply` + `Iso.hom_inv_id_app`.
- `homTensorFunctor_tilde_exact` (~2118) — `Function.Surjective ((homTensorFunctor f I F).map ((tilde.functor A).map sc.g))`. `tilde_exact` + `External.flat_tensor_exact` → base-changed `𝒪_X`-SES `scT`; `functorT_eq_zero` → `Subsingleton (Ext I scT.X₁ 1)` → connecting map vanishes → `Abelian.Ext.covariant_sequence_exact₃` lifts every degree-0 class; `Ext.mk₀_bijective` + `Ext.mk₀_comp_mk₀` → Hom-set surjectivity. **GOTCHA:** explicit `haveI : (tilde.functor A).PreservesZeroMorphisms := inferInstance` BEFORE `set scT` (elaboration-order; `Functor.Additive.preservesZeroMorphisms` does NOT exist). Degree bookkeeping: `zero_add 1` not `(by omega)`.
- `hom_postcomp_surjective_of_functorT_zero` (private, ~2138, transport core) — `Surjective (· ≫ sc.g)` for f.p. `N` with `Ñ ≅ H`. Whisker `H_represents`' iso by `tilde` (`Functor.isoWhiskerLeft` — NOT `CategoryTheory.isoWhiskerLeft`) → `surjective_of_natIso_map`; whisker `(coyoneda.mapIso e.op).symm`; descend through `tilde.fullyFaithfulFunctor` (`FF.preimage`/`map_preimage`/`map_injective`). **unmatched** (needs blueprint). Removed an unnecessary `coyoneda_obj_map` simp step (unknown identifier).
- `H_free_of_functorT_zero` (~2208) — free cover `Aⁿ ↠ N` (`Module.Finite.exists_fin'`), kernel SES (`ShortComplex.ShortExact.mk (exact_kernel pm)`), transport core on `𝟙 N` splits it → `Module.Projective.iff_split_of_projective` → `Module.Flat.of_projective` → `Module.free_of_flat_of_isLocalRing` → `Module.Free A N`; `chooseBasis.repr` + `tilde_free` → `IsFreeMod (H f I F ha)`. **GOTCHA:** `ha.lfp_F : IsLFP F` mis-infers `R` as explicit `SheafOfModules.IsFinitePresentation` — use dot notation `F.IsFinitePresentation`.
- `H_locallyFree_of_ext_vanishing` (~2259, re-signed + CLOSED) — STEP A re-sign `+(hI : IsSFlat f I)` + relocate to EOF; STEP E body `External.reduce_H_locallyFree_to_spec_local f I F ha hI s hs (by intro X' A inst1 inst2 f' I' F' ha' hI' hs'; exact @H_free_of_functorT_zero …)`. **GOTCHA:** plain `fun`-lambda misaligned implicit `X'`/instance binders → explicit `intro` + `@`-application.
- 3 EGA anchors: `External.H_isLFP` (III₂ 7.7.6), `External.reduce_H_locallyFree_to_spec_local` (IV₃ §8 + 1.1 base change; premise = the §1 output `H_free_of_functorT_zero`), `External.lfp_free_at_point_locallyFree` (O_I 5.4.1/2.4.1) — **authored per blueprint but NOT consumed** (folded into `reduce_H_locallyFree_to_spec_local`); dead axiom, see recommendations.

## Untouched (deferred deep §1 sorries — correctly not attempted)
- `H_tensor_invertible` (1.1.2) + `H_tensor` (1.1.3) — PAUSED monoidal lane (no `MonoidalCategory X.Modules`).
- `ext_finite_flat` (1.10) — `IsLFPAndFlatOn` opaque stub; needs `R^q f_*` + internal `ℰxt` (absent).

## This session's analysis
- 105 events: 23 edits, 18 diagnostics (7+ clean), 30 lemma searches, 2 final `lake build` (exit 0). 9 transient errors, all self-corrected (instance-synth order, deprecated/removed API names, degree bookkeeping, binder alignment). REPL/diagnostic-driven, low-churn.
- Exemplary judgment: built the planned STEPs exactly; refuted the plan's two "possibly-absent" Mathlib gaps by finding the real lemmas; isolated `IsSFlat f I` as the faithful sig fix (not added to `Admissible`); `lean_verify`'d the close; stopped precisely at the 3 off-lane sorries.
- `sync_leanok`: iter=30, sha 6777102, added=2, removed=0 — markers on genuinely sorry-free decls. No laundering; no manual override needed (audited).
- `dag-query`: gaps=0; frontier = unchanged `External.*` leaves; **unmatched=2** (the 2 private helpers) → recommendations coverage debt.
- Doctor: 20 `External.*` re-flagged (17 intentional + 3 new sanctioned EGA). No orphan chapters / broken refs.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. No `\mathlibok` warranted (no decl is a direct Mathlib re-export). No `\lean{...}` rename (prover names match blueprint hints; only signature/phrasing deltas, which the planner reconciles in prose). `sync_leanok` (added=2) handled the proof-block markers; no override needed.

## Convergence verdict
**Genuine, planned progress — best-case `mathlib-build` iter and a lane terminus.** 1.3 was the headline open §1 theorem; brick 6 closed it. Each iter since 023 landed a forward-feeding brick (T → universe → ii/iv → iii core → iii surj → `Ext¹_X(I,j_*j^*F)=0` → `T(k(s))=0` → `T(M)=0 ∀M` → THIS close). NOT receding-horizon churn. Three §1 deep theorems now closed (1.4 @017, 1.2 @022, 1.3 @030). Sorry-flat-then-drop + only-sanctioned-anchors is the expected signature.
